steps.title: Look for a decline over time
steps.content: The researcher's claim is that some lakes saw a decline in ice duration between the early 1980s and the mid-2000s. A typical example must compare the same lake across those two periods and show fewer ice days later.

steps.title: Reject nondecline examples
steps.content: A reports only 2005-06 data, C shows an increase rather than a decline, and D reports only 1980-81 data. None demonstrates the claimed decrease across time. The answer is B.
